name: construction project accountants processing 5–15 subcontractor payrolls/month tool
description: For construction project accountants processing 5–15 subcontractor payrolls/month, inaccurate reconciliation causes cash flow gaps. We automate the reconciliation process instead of manual reconciliation processes using spreadsheets.
target_audience: construction project accountants processing 5–15 subcontractor payrolls/month
problem_solved: Inaccurate reconciliation of subcontractor hours and payroll.
